title: Citrusy Juicy Mexican Chicken Tacos
description: A twist on traditional Mexican chicken tacos, featuring a zesty and flavorful panang curry paste with a hint of citrus and caramelized onions.
instructions: Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and season with salt, pepper, cumin, and paprika. Set aside.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes. Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
Add the onion to the pan and caramelize for 10-12 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the panang curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the lime and orange juice to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the cooked chicken back to the pan and stir to coat with the curry sauce.
Cook the chicken in the sauce for an additional 5-7 minutes, until cooked through.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing the chicken onto the tortillas and topping with avocado or guacamole, if desired.
